---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r, setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(survey)
library(broom)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
data_path_2000_2015 <- file.path("data", "NHTSA_databases", "NHTSA All files")
```


```{r get MADYMO HIC values and build MADYMO dataframe, eval=FALSE}
# create dataframe with MADYMO data
BELTUSE_BIN <- c(0, 1)
BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- c(0, 1)
SEATPOS <- c(11, 13)
madymo_DVTOTAL <- 5:65

MADYMO_df <- data.frame()
MADYMO_df <- expand.grid(
  BELTUSE_BIN = BELTUSE_BIN,
  BAGDEPLOY_BIN = BAGDEPLOY_BIN,
  SEATPOS = SEATPOS,
  DVTOTAL = madymo_DVTOTAL
)

MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN)
MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN)
MADYMO_df$SEATPOS <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$SEATPOS)

# write madymo dataframe (without HIC data) to .csv file for reference outside of this code
# write.csv(MADYMO_df, file = file.path("data", "MADYMO_df.csv"))

MADYMO_df <- MADYMO_df %>%
  mutate(
    file_path = file.path(
      "data",
      "minimal_simulations",
      paste0(DVTOTAL, "_mph"),
      ifelse(SEATPOS == 11, "driver", "pass"),
      ifelse(BELTUSE_BIN == 0, "nobelt", "belt"),
      ifelse(BAGDEPLOY_BIN == 0, "noairbag", "airbag"),
      "madymo",
      "madymo.peak"
    )
  )

MADYMO_df <- MADYMO_df %>%
  mutate(
    MADYMO_HIC15 = NA,
    T1_15 = NA,
    T2_15 = NA,
    MADYMO_HIC36 = NA,
    T1_36 = NA,
    T2_36 = NA,
    MADYMO_PEAK_LACC = NA,
    MADYMO_PEAK_AACC = NA
  )


# check if all files exist
file_exist_errors <- list()
for (i in MADYMO_df$file_path[1:nrow(MADYMO_df)]) {
  if (!file.exists(file.path(i))) {
    file_exist_errors[i] <- i}
}

# print error message
if (length(file_exist_errors) != 0) {
  cat("Files missing:", paste(file_exist_errors, "\n"))
} else {
  cat("No MADYMO files missing")
}

# Initialize a list to store file names that caused errors
error_names <- c()

# Loop through each file in the "file_path_name" column of MADYMO_df
# Loop through each file in the "file_path" column of MADYMO_df
for (i in 1:nrow(MADYMO_df)) {  # Process the first 5 files for testing
  file_name <- MADYMO_df$file_path[i]
  cat("Processing file:", file_name, "\n")
  
  # Use tryCatch to handle errors (like missing files)
  result <- tryCatch({
    # Step 1: Read the file into R
    cat("Attempting to read file:", file_name, "\n")
    lines <- readLines(file_name)
    
    print(paste("Loading", file_name))
    
    # Initialize empty variables to store the extracted values
    MADYMO_HIC15 <- NA
    T1_15 <- NA
    T2_15 <- NA
    MADYMO_HIC36 <- NA
    T1_36 <- NA
    T2_36 <- NA
    MADYMO_PEAK_LACC <- NA
    MADYMO_PEAK_AACC <- NA
    
    cat("Successfully read file:", file_name, "\n")
    
    # Function to extract the numeric values from the line
    extract_hic_values <- function(line) {
      # Extract VALUE
      value <- as.numeric(gsub(".*VALUE[^0-9]*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      # Extract T1
      t1 <- as.numeric(gsub(".*T1\\s*=\\s*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      # Extract T2
      t2 <- as.numeric(gsub(".*T2\\s*=\\s*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      return(list(value = value, t1 = t1, t2 = t2))
    }
    
    # Function to extract the third number (maximum resultant acceleration) from the "Res. acceleration" line
    extract_res_acceleration <- function(line) {
      # Use regular expression to capture all numbers, including scientific notation
      matches <- regmatches(line, gregexpr("[+-]?\\d*\\.?\\d+(E[+-]?\\d+)?", line))
      
      # Extract the third number from the matched results
      if (length(matches[[1]]) >= 3) {
        res_acc <- as.numeric(matches[[1]][4])  # The third number
      } else {
        res_acc <- NA
      }
      
      return(res_acc)
    }
    
    # Step 2: Loop through the lines to find relevant information
    for (j in 1:(length(lines) - 2)) {
      
      # Check for HIC15_inj line
      if (grepl("HIC15_inj", lines[j])) {
        # Extract VALUE, T1, and T2 from the next-next line
        value_line <- lines[j + 2]
        
        values_15 <- extract_hic_values(value_line)
        MADYMO_HIC15 <- values_15$value
        T1_15 <- values_15$t1
        T2_15 <- values_15$t2
      }
      
      # Check for HIC36_inj line
      if (grepl("HIC36_inj", lines[j])) {
        # Extract VALUE, T1, and T2 from the next-next line
        value_line <- lines[j + 2]
        
        values_36 <- extract_hic_values(value_line)
        MADYMO_HIC36 <- values_36$value
        T1_36 <- values_36$t1
        T2_36 <- values_36$t2
      }
      
      # Check for the /HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc identifier line
      if (grepl("/HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc", lines[j])) {
        cat("Found /HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc at line", j, "\n")
        
        # Look for the "Res. acceleration" line in the next few lines
        for (k in (j+1):(j+5)) {  # We check the next 5 lines to find the "Res. acceleration" line
          if (grepl("Res. acceleration", lines[k])) {
            cat("Found Res. acceleration at line", k, "\n")
            
            # Extract the maximum resultant acceleration
            MADYMO_PEAK_LACC <- extract_res_acceleration(lines[k])
            cat("Extracted max resultant acceleration (m/s/s) (MADYMO_PEAK_LACC):", MADYMO_PEAK_LACC, "\n")
            break
          }
        }
      }
      
      # Check for the /HumanMale50%/Head_aac identifier line
      if (grepl("/HumanMale50%/Head_aac", lines[j])) {
        cat("Found /HumanMale50%/Head_aac at line", j, "\n")
        
        # Look for the "Res. ang. acc." line in the next few lines
        for (k in (j+1):(j+5)) {  # We check the next 5 lines to find the "Res. ang. acc." line
          if (grepl("Res. ang. acc.", lines[k])) {
            cat("Found Res. ang. acc. at line", k, "\n")
            
            # Extract the maximum resultant acceleration
            MADYMO_PEAK_AACC <- extract_res_acceleration(lines[k])
            cat("Extracted max resultant acceleration (MADYMO_PEAK_AACC):", MADYMO_PEAK_AACC, "\n")
            break
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Step 3: Assign the extracted values to the corresponding row in MADYMO_df
    MADYMO_df$MADYMO_HIC15[i] <- MADYMO_HIC15
    MADYMO_df$T1_15[i] <- T1_15
    MADYMO_df$T2_15[i] <- T2_15
    MADYMO_df$MADYMO_HIC36[i] <- MADYMO_HIC36
    MADYMO_df$T1_36[i] <- T1_36
    MADYMO_df$T2_36[i] <- T2_36
    MADYMO_df$MADYMO_PEAK_LACC[i] <- MADYMO_PEAK_LACC
    MADYMO_df$MADYMO_PEAK_AACC[i] <- MADYMO_PEAK_AACC
    
    TRUE  # Indicate success
  }, error = function(e) {
    # Add the file name to error_names if there was an error
    cat("Error in processing file:", file_name, "\n")
    error_names <<- c(error_names, file_name)
    FALSE  # Indicate failure
  })
  
  # Log successful or failed processing
  if (result) {
    cat("File processed successfully:", file_name, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file due to error:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}

# convert LACC to g
MADYMO_df$MADYMO_PEAK_LACC_g <- MADYMO_df$MADYMO_PEAK_LACC / 9.81

# Print the list of files that caused errors
if (length(error_names) > 0) {
  cat(length(error_names), " Files with errors:", paste(error_names, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No errors occurred during processing.\n")
}

# fwrite madymo data frame
# fwrite(MADYMO_df, file = file.path("data", "MADYMO_df.csv"))


```



```{r build nhtsa dataframe}
# Helper function to process data for each year
vehicle_count <- 0
individual_count <- 0

process_year <- function(year) {
  # Load datasets (replace paths as necessary)
  # occupant injury
  oi <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oi.sas7bdat")))
  # occupant 
  oa <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oa.sas7bdat")))
  # general vehicle
  gv <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "gv.sas7bdat")))
  # vehicle event
  ve <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "ve.sas7bdat")))
  # accident
  accident <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "accident.sas7bdat")))
  
  print(paste("Year:", year))
  
  
  # Injury processing
  injury_temp <- oi %>%
    mutate(
      # Handle column name inconsistencies
      BODYREG = if ("BODYREG" %in% names(.)) BODYREG else bodyreg,
      LESION = if ("LESION" %in% names(.)) LESION else lesion
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      BACK = ifelse(BODYREG == "B", 1, 0),
      NECK = ifelse(BODYREG == "N", 1, 0),
      CONCUSSION = ifelse(LESION == "K", 1, 0),
      AIS1 = ifelse(AIS >= 1 & AIS <= 6, 1, 0)
    )
  
  print(paste("all injuries count:", nrow(injury_temp)))
  
  # Summarize injuries (1 row per occupant)
  injury_summary <- injury_temp %>%
    group_by(PSU, CASENO, VEHNO, OCCNO) %>%
    summarise(
      BACK = max(BACK, na.rm = TRUE),
      NECK = max(NECK, na.rm = TRUE),
      CONCUSSION = max(CONCUSSION, na.rm = TRUE),
      AIS1 = max(AIS1, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # Replace -Inf with NA (from max(na.rm=TRUE when all values are NA)
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.infinite(.), NA, .)))
  
  print(paste("all injured individuals count:", nrow(injury_summary)))
  
  # Start with occupant data (oa) and LEFT JOIN injuries
  
  occ <- oa %>%
    # Merge injury data (retain all occupants, even if uninjured)
    left_join(injury_summary, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "OCCNO")) %>%
    # Replace NA with 0 for injury columns (uninjured occupants)
    mutate(
      across(c(BACK, NECK, CONCUSSION, AIS1), ~ replace_na(., 0)),
      OI = ifelse(BACK == 1 | NECK == 1 | CONCUSSION == 1 | AIS1 == 1, 1, 0),
      BELTUSE_BIN = ifelse(MANUSE %in% c(0, 1), 0, ifelse(MANUSE == 4, 1, NA)),
      BAGDEPLOY_BIN = ifelse(BAGDEPLY == 1, 1, 0),
      BMI = WEIGHT / ((HEIGHT / 100) ^ 2),
      BMI_HIGH = ifelse(BMI >= 30, 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(SEATPOS %in% c(11, 13))  # Front-left and front-right seats
  
  
  # count all vehicles involved in all crashes in all years
  oa_grouped <- oa %>%
    group_by(PSU, CASENO, OCCNO)
  individual_count <<- individual_count + nrow(oa_grouped)
  
  # NEED TO FIX CRASH DIRECTION FILTERING
  
  
  print(paste("injured + uninjured count:", nrow(occ)))
  
  
  
  # Vehicle data
  veh <- gv %>%
    inner_join(ve, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO")) %>%
    mutate(
      KEEP = ifelse(
        DOF1 %in% c(
          1, 11, 12, 21, 31, 
          32, 41, 51, 52, 61, 
          71, 72, 81, 91, 92
        ), 1, 0),
      DV_MPH = round(DVTOTAL * 0.621371)
    ) %>%
    filter(KEEP == 1)
  
  # count all vehicles involved in all crashes in all years
  vehicle_count <<- vehicle_count + nrow(gv)
  
  
  print(paste("gv + veh count:", nrow(veh)))
  
  # front temp
  front_temp <- occ %>%
    inner_join(veh, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO"))
  
  print(paste("veh + occ count:", nrow(front_temp)))
  
  # front final
  front <- front_temp %>%
    # filter(EVENTS == 2) %>%
    inner_join(accident, by = c("PSU", "CASENO"))
  
  print(paste("accident + front count:", nrow(front)))
  
  return(front)
}

# Loop through years and process data
years <- 2000:2015
# years <- 2000
all_data <- lapply(years, process_year)
front_combined <- bind_rows(all_data)



# Final adjustments
nhtsa_combined_df <- front_combined %>%
  mutate(
    BACK = ifelse(BACK < 1, 0, BACK),
    NECK = ifelse(NECK < 1, 0, NECK),
    CONCUSSION = ifelse(CONCUSSION < 1, 0, CONCUSSION),
    AIS1 = ifelse(AIS1 < 1, 0, AIS1),
    OI = ifelse(OI < 1, 0, OI),
    # need to make sure this is catching the right group
    INJURED = ifelse(OI == 1 | MAIS > 0 | INJNUM > 0, 1, 0),
    SEX_BIN = ifelse(SEX == 1, 0, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(INJURED = ifelse(
    (MAIS == 0 & INJNUM == 0) &
      (TREATMNT %in% c(1, 2) | 
         DEATH > 0 | 
         INJSEV == 4 |
         TREATMNT %in% c(3, 5, 6, 7, 8) | 
         (TREATMNT == 4 & INJSEV > 0) |
         MEDFACIL %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8)), 1, INJURED
  )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    DV_MPH >= 5 & DV_MPH <= 65,
    !is.na(BELTUSE_BIN),
    !is.na(BAGDEPLOY_BIN),
    !is.na(INJURED)
  )

print(paste("all entries all years (before filter):", nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)))


nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>% 
  select(order(colnames(nhtsa_combined_df)))

# make appropriate variables into factors
# sort(colnames(nhtsa_combined_df))
cols_factor <- c("BAGDEPLY", "BAGDEPLOY_BIN", "BELTUSE_BIN", "BMI_HIGH", "CONCUSSION", "DVEST", "INJURED", "MANUSE", "OBJCONT1", "OBJCONT2", "OCCNO", "OI", "PSU", "ROLLOVER", "SEATPOS", "SEX", "VEHNO", "VEHTYPE", "YEAR")
nhtsa_combined_df[cols_factor] <- lapply(nhtsa_combined_df[cols_factor], factor)

cols_explore <- c(cols_factor, "AGE", "BMI", "DV_MPH", "DVTOTAL", "HEIGHT",  "WEIGHT")

explore_df <- subset(nhtsa_combined_df, select = cols_explore)

# explore data
summary(explore_df)

```

```{r examine missingness and extreme values}
# examine missingness
missing_values <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.))) %>%
  gather(variable, missing) %>%
  filter(missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))

print(missing_values)

# examine extreme values
# DO THIS LATER
# look at Belt and 10-25 kmh groups
```

```{r filter and join MADYMO data}
# exclude NA values for some variables
# nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
#   subset(
#     
#   )

# columns that will be kept in final dataset
cols_final <- c(cols_explore, "PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "OCCNO", "INJNUM", "MAIS", "INJSEV", "TREATMNT", "MEDFACIL", "EVENTS", "BACK", "NECK", "CONCUSSION", "AIS1")

# select only relevant columns
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  select(
    all_of(cols_final))

print(paste("all years (after filter):", nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)))

# make all relevant variables correct datatypes

# join MADYMO data to NHTSA dataframe
madymo_nhtsa_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  left_join(MADYMO_df, by = join_by(DV_MPH == DVTOTAL, SEATPOS == SEATPOS, BELTUSE_BIN == BELTUSE_BIN, BAGDEPLOY_BIN == BAGDEPLOY_BIN))

# transform MADYMO_HIC15 to see if numbers are more legible
madymo_nhtsa_df$MADYMO_HIC15_transformed <- madymo_nhtsa_df$MADYMO_HIC15/1000


# create dataframes for different subgroups
subgroups_df <- list(
  drivers_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(SEATPOS == 11),
  
  passengers_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(SEATPOS == 13),
  
  airbag_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(BAGDEPLOY_BIN == 1),
  
  no_airbag_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(BAGDEPLOY_BIN == 0),
  
  belt_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(BELTUSE_BIN == 1),
  
  no_belt_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(BELTUSE_BIN == 0),
  
  ten_twentyfive_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(DVTOTAL >= 10 & DVTOTAL <= 25),
  
  twentyfive_forty_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(DVTOTAL >= 25 & DVTOTAL <= 40),
  
  forty_fiftyfive_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(DVTOTAL >= 40 & DVTOTAL <= 55),
  
  fiftyfive_df = madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    filter(DVTOTAL >= 55)
)



# examine frequency of DV_MPH values for all crashes with histogram
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = DV_MPH)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2.5) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Crash Speeds (All)", x = "Crash Speed (mph)", y = "Frequency") +
  # x axis every 5 mph
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 65, by = 5))

# examine frequency of head injury values by speed for all crashes with histogram
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = DV_MPH, fill = INJURED)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Crash Speeds by Injury Status (All)", x = "Crash Speed (mph)", y = "Frequency") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "blue", "1" = "red")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 65, by = 5))

# examine frequency of head injury values by speed for all crashes, separated by SEATPOS with histogram
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = DV_MPH, fill = INJURED)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Crash Speeds by Injury Status (All)", x = "Crash Speed (mph)", y = "Frequency") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "blue", "1" = "red")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 65, by = 5)) +
  facet_wrap(~SEATPOS) +
  # replace fill names with "Driver" and "Passenger"
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Occupant Type"))
```



```{r univariate logistic models}
# full univariate model
univariate_models <- list(
  logistic_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ (MADYMO_HIC15_transformed), 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = madymo_nhtsa_df),
  
  complex_logistic_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed + 
      BELTUSE_BIN + BAGDEPLOY_BIN + 
      SEATPOS + DV_MPH, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = madymo_nhtsa_df),
  
  # drivers only
  drivers_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$drivers_df),
  
  # passengers only
  passengers_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$passengers_df),
  
  # airbag only
  airbag_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$airbag_df),
  
  # no airbag only
  no_airbag_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$no_airbag_df),
  
  # belt only
  belt_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$belt_df),
  
  # no belt only
  no_belt_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$no_belt_df),
  
  # 10-25 kmh only DVTOTAL
  ten_twentyfive_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$ten_twentyfive_df),
  
  # 25-40 kmh only DVTOTAL
  twentyfive_forty_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$twentyfive_forty_df),
  
  # 40-55 kmh only DVTOTAL
  forty_fiftyfive_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$forty_fiftyfive_df),
  
  # 55+ kmh only DVTOTAL
  fiftyfive_df_model = glm(
    INJURED ~ MADYMO_HIC15_transformed, 
    family = "binomial", 
    data = subgroups_df$fiftyfive_df)
)

summary(univariate_models$logistic_model)
summary(univariate_models$complex_logistic_model)
summary(univariate_models$drivers_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$passengers_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$airbag_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$belt_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$no_belt_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$ten_twentyfive_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$twentyfive_forty_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$forty_fiftyfive_df_model)
summary(univariate_models$fiftyfive_df_model)



# collect coefficients and p-values for all models, N count and %, avg HIC into a dataframe
model_summary_df <- data.frame(
  model = c("all",  "drivers", "passengers", "airbag", 
            "no_airbag", "belt", "no_belt", 
            "10-25 kmh", "25-40 kmh", "40-55 kmh", 
            "55+ kmh"),
  Î˛ = c(
    univariate_models$logistic_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$drivers_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$passengers_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$airbag_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$belt_df_model$coefficients[2], 
    univariate_models$no_belt_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$ten_twentyfive_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$twentyfive_forty_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$forty_fiftyfive_df_model$coefficients[2],
    univariate_models$fiftyfive_df_model$coefficients[2]
  ),
  log_p_values = c(
    coef(summary(univariate_models$logistic_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$drivers_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$passengers_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$airbag_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$belt_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$no_belt_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$ten_twentyfive_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$twentyfive_forty_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$forty_fiftyfive_df_model))[,4][2],
    coef(summary(univariate_models$fiftyfive_df_model))[,4][2]
  ),
  OR_exp_Î˛ = c(
    exp(univariate_models$logistic_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$drivers_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$passengers_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$airbag_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$belt_df_model$coefficients[2]), 
    exp(univariate_models$no_belt_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$ten_twentyfive_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$twentyfive_forty_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$forty_fiftyfive_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    exp(univariate_models$fiftyfive_df_model$coefficients[2])
  ),
  ratio_exp_Î˛ = c(
    NA,
    exp(univariate_models$drivers_df_model$coefficients[2])/
      exp(univariate_models$passengers_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    NA,
    exp(univariate_models$airbag_df_model$coefficients[2])/
      exp(univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    NA,
    exp(univariate_models$belt_df_model$coefficients[2])/
      exp(univariate_models$no_belt_df_model$coefficients[2]),
    NA,
    NA,
    NA,
    NA,
    NA
  ),
  N = c(
    nrow(madymo_nhtsa_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$drivers_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$passengers_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$airbag_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$no_airbag_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$belt_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$no_belt_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$ten_twentyfive_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$twentyfive_forty_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$forty_fiftyfive_df),
    nrow(subgroups_df$fiftyfive_df)
  ),
  N_prct = c(
    round(
      nrow(madymo_nhtsa_df)/
        nrow(madymo_nhtsa_df)*100, 
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$drivers_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100, 
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$passengers_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$airbag_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$no_airbag_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$belt_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$no_belt_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100, 
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$ten_twentyfive_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$twentyfive_forty_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100, 
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$forty_fiftyfive_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100, 
      digits = 2),
    round(
      nrow(subgroups_df$fiftyfive_df)/
        nrow(subgroups_df$madymo_nhtsa_df)*100,
      digits = 2)
  ),
  avg_hic = c(
    round(
      mean(madymo_nhtsa_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$drivers_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$passengers_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$airbag_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$no_airbag_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$belt_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$no_belt_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$ten_twentyfive_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$twentyfive_forty_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$forty_fiftyfive_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2),
    round(
      mean(subgroups_df$fiftyfive_df$MADYMO_HIC15, na.rm = TRUE),
      digits = 2)
  )
)

model_summary_df

```

```{r clean environment}
# clean unnecessary objects from enviroment
# clean out all items in environment except ones in kept_items
kept_items <- c("madymo_nhtsa_df", "MADYMO_df", "explore_df", "individual_count", "vehicle_count", "cols_explore", "data_path_2000_2015", "univariate_models", "subgroups_df")
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), kept_items))
```


```{r plot coefficients and p-values}
# Check for convergence issues
glance(univariate_models$belt_df_model) %>% 
  select(null.deviance, df.residual, nobs)

# Check sample size and outcome distribution
subgroups_df$belt_df %>% 
  count(INJURED) %>% 
  mutate(prop = n/sum(n))

# Check for complete separation
table(subgroups_df$belt_df$INJURED, subgroups_df$belt_df$MADYMO_HIC15_transformed)


models <- list(
  "Full" = univariate_models$logistic_model,
  "Drivers" = univariate_models$drivers_df_model,
  "Passengers" = univariate_models$passengers_df_model,
  "Airbag" = univariate_models$airbag_df_model,
  "No Airbag" = univariate_models$no_airbag_df_model,
  "Belt" = univariate_models$belt_df_model,
  "No Belt" = univariate_models$no_belt_df_model,
  "10-25 kmh" = univariate_models$ten_twentyfive_df_model,
  "25-40 kmh" = univariate_models$twentyfive_forty_df_model,
  "40-55 kmh" = univariate_models$forty_fiftyfive_df_model,
  "55+ kmh" = univariate_models$fiftyfive_df_model
)



# ISSUE: BELT has no confidence levels in results_table

safe_tidy <- safely(~ tidy(.x, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE))

results_table <- map_dfr(models, ~ {
  result <- safe_tidy(.x)
  if (!is.null(result$error)) {
    tidy(.x, conf.int = FALSE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%  # Fallback without CIs
      mutate(conf.low = NA, conf.high = NA)
  } else {
    result$result
  }
}, .id = "Subgroup") %>% 
  filter(term == "MADYMO_HIC15_transformed") %>% 
  select(Subgroup, estimate, std.error, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)







# visualize odds ratios CIs per univariate model using 



ggplot(results_table, aes(x = estimate, y = Subgroup)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)", y = "Subgroup", title = "Effect of MADYMO_HIC15_transformed on Injury Risk") +
  theme_minimal() +
  # only show -1 to 1
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 3))
```
